name: Lemon Herbed Roasted Chicken
recipeIngredient: 3 pounds fryer or roasting chicken (up to 4 lbs)
recipeInstructions:
1. Rinse the chicken well and pat dry; remove any excess fat.
2. Place an onion in the cavity of the chicken and rub the skin with butter or margarine.
3. Place the chicken in a Crock-Pot.
4. Squeeze the juice of the lemon over the chicken and sprinkle with remaining seasonings.
5. Cover and cook on Low for 8 to 10 hours, or on High for 4 to 5 hours.
